message:
test(config): coverage boost — Validate, ProcessTriage, MergeConfig, mergeStringList

Pushes config package from 90.2% → 92.0%. Key improvements:
- ValidateProcessTriageConfig: 71.4% → 100% (all boundary/error branches)
- Validate (main aggregator): 64.6% → 90.8% (sub-validator error paths)
- MergeConfig: 42.9% → 100% (palette loading, dedup, traversal guard)
- mergeStringListPreferFirst: already 100%, now with dedicated edge case tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
